summary: The diff implements both REQ-1 and REQ-2 substantially. The frontend SignUpPage now renders a functional form with name, email, phone, age, position, and experience level fields. The backend enforces a 3-slot total cap and returns an error on the 4th submission. The frontend shows remaining slots and a 'Team Full' state. One minor gap exists: the remaining slot count for anonymous users returns -1 (unknown), so the slot counter may not display for unauthenticated visitors, though the form itself remains accessible.

missing_requirements.requirement: The frontend displays remaining slot count (e.g., '2 slots remaining') and updates it after each submission — for any visitor including anonymous.
missing_requirements.reason: The useGetRemainingSlots hook returns -1 when the caller is anonymous/unauthorized (cannot call getAllSignUps), and the SignUpPage treats -1 as 'unknown', hiding the slot counter. Anonymous visitors will not see the remaining slot count, partially violating the AC that the remaining slot count is displayed and updated.

hallucinated_features.description: Per-position capacity enforcement in addition to the global 3-slot cap
hallucinated_features.reason: The backend validatePositionAvailability checks both a global 3-slot total AND per-position capacity (maxCapacity 3 per position). The build request explicitly states per-position capacity tracking is a non-goal and that a single shared pool of 3 total slots is required.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration module added as a new file
hallucinated_features.reason: No migration was requested in the build request. The migration module was added as a new file not mentioned in any requirement.
